name: my-marketplace
description: Local marketplace — personal overlay on the AIDD framework

plugins.name: aidd-overlay
plugins.description: Extends the AIDD framework: dig, harvest, reconcile-normative, data-optimize, web-optimize, status.

plugins.name: sc-php
plugins.description: PHP ecosystem skills: Laravel/Symfony/WordPress perf pivots, HTMX hybrid, Eloquent + Doctrine data pivots.

plugins.name: sc-js
plugins.description: JavaScript ecosystem: sniff (Nuxt/Vue/SvelteKit/Alpine/Vite/Astro), audit, improve (8 capability pivots in Step 1.5), legacy (Vue 2→3/ESM/TS), teach + perf pivots + Prisma/Drizzle/TypeORM/Mongoose/GraphQL/tRPC data pivots.

plugins.name: sc-tiers
plugins.description: Third-party SaaS consumption rules: Firebase coding + Firebase/Supabase/DynamoDB/Hasura data pivots.

plugins.name: sc-python
plugins.description: Python ecosystem: two-tier sniff (pivot model), audit, Django/FastAPI perf pivots + Django ORM/SQLAlchemy data pivots.

plugins.name: sc-rust
plugins.description: Rust ecosystem: two-tier sniff (pivot model), audit, Axum/Actix-web perf pivots + SQLx/Diesel data pivots.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Personal Obsidian notes management — Pro project lifecycle (create, fill, reorganize, log-session, log-meeting, add-invoice, export-rag) and JDR solo player-character management (new, fill, reorganize, log-session, show).
